headline: Did UGG’s New Golden Collection Push Into Year-Round Comfort Just Shift Deckers (DECK) Narrative?
summary: In March 2026, UGG, a division of Deckers Brands, launched its Spring 2026 Golden Collection of warm-weather sandals and clogs, extending the brand’s signature comfort into year-round styles and featuring a campaign with Elsa Hosk and Rina Sawayama. The collection’s focus on recycled materials, fresh textures, and silhouettes that reinterpret the Classic Boot suggests Deckers is pushing UGG further into all-season, fashion-forward territory while reinforcing its comfort heritage.
